allow: Bash(npx tsc *)
Bash(netstat -ano)
Bash(findstr ":8000")
Bash(findstr LISTEN)
PowerShell(netstat *)

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/patient/hero/trajectory" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($response.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $response.Content.Length\)\)\))
PowerShell(Stop-Process *)
PowerShell(taskkill *)
PowerShell(Get-Process *)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/cohort" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content.Substring\(0, 200\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/patient/hero/trajectory" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content.Substring\(0, 300\)\) } catch { $e = $_.Exception.Response; if \($e\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($e.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $body = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "Error body: $body" } else { Write-Host "Error: $_" } })

PowerShell($req = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create\("http://localhost:8000/api/patient/hero/trajectory"\); $req.Timeout = 10000; try { $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,300\)\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Error $\($resp.StatusCode\): $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/patient/hero/trajectory" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content.Substring\(0, 200\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Health: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Not up yet: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/patient/hero/trajectory" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Trajectory: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Keys: $\($json.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/cohort" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Cohort patients: $\($json.cohort.Count\), stats total: $\($json.summary_stats.total_patients\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/patient/hero" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Patient: $\($json.patient.name\), clocks panel: $\($json.clocks_panel -ne $null\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Frontend: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/patient/hero" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"name":"Test Patient","chronological_age":45,"sex":"Male","ethnicity":"Caucasian","lifestyle_score":7.0}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/patient/new" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content.Substring\(0, 300\)\) } catch { $e = $_.Exception.Response; if \($e\) { $stream = $e.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Host "Error $\($e.StatusCode\): $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Error: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Health: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"name":"Alice Smith","chronological_age":48,"sex":"Female","ethnicity":"Hispanic","lifestyle_score":8.0}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/patient/new" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Created: $\($json.id\) - $\($json.name\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/cohort" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; $cohort = $r2.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Cohort total: $\($cohort.cohort.Count\)"; $found = $cohort.cohort | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "Alice Smith" }; Write-Host "Found in cohort: $\($found -ne $null\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/cohort" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "cohort array length: $\($json.cohort.Count\)"; Write-Host "total_patients stat: $\($json.summary_stats.total_patients\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8002/api/cohort" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "total_patients: $\($json.summary_stats.total_patients\)"; Write-Host "cohort array: $\($json.cohort.Count\)")
